patternCandidates.name: Benchmark registry (7 methods, 2 scorers)
patternCandidates.description: Pluggable registry for comparing implementations against same dataset with independent scoring approaches. METHOD_REGISTRY + SCORE_REGISTRY + published dataset.
patternCandidates.notes: GPL code not importable but PATTERN is freely extractable. Applicable to T28 skill quality measurement.

knowledgeCandidates.name: 3-stage pipeline (provider/processor/renderer)
knowledgeCandidates.description: Clean separation: extract -> transform -> render. Each stage independently extensible with 6 extension points.

knowledgeCandidates.name: ConfigParser introspection for component discovery
knowledgeCandidates.description: Auto-discovers available builders, processors, converters by inspecting module structure.

knowledgeCandidates.name: Session-scoped test fixtures for ML models
knowledgeCandidates.description: Load expensive models once per session. Custom pytest markers for parameterization.

knowledgeCandidates.name: GPU-enforced CI as quality gate
knowledgeCandidates.description: Tests run on t4_gpu runners. Expensive = strict enforcement of production-like testing.

antiPatternCandidates.name: GPL_LICENSE_TRAP
antiPatternCandidates.description: GPL-3.0 copyleft blocks adoption as dependency. Must extract patterns only, never import code.

antiPatternCandidates.name: SECURITY_AS_AFTERTHOUGHT
antiPatternCandidates.description: Shell injection, path traversal, credential exposure in a tool processing untrusted PDFs.

antiPatternCandidates.name: CONTRIBUTOR_HOSTILE_GOVERNANCE
antiPatternCandidates.description: 33.7K stars, 403 issues, no CONTRIBUTING, no CODE_OF_CONDUCT. Users optimized, contributors not.

cross_repo_connections.detail: Both PDF-to-markdown. MinerU AGPL, marker GPL. Marker has better benchmarks (7-method vs self-reported). Both license-blocked for adoption.
ArchiveBox archives web pages; marker converts PDFs. Different input types, both produce structured output.
crawl4ai extracts web content; marker extracts PDF content. Different content sources for LLM consumption.

related_repos.discovery_context: OCR engine by same author, pinned as core dependency
IBM PDF converter, compared in benchmarks
LlamaIndex PDF parser, compared in benchmarks
